.gitignore.general_idea: Add ignore rule for flattened POM files generated by Maven flatten plugin.
Remove specific IDE and module ignore entries in favor of a generic target directory ignore.
.gitignore.before:
.idea/dataSources.ids
.idea/dataSources.xml
.idea/dataSources.local.xml
.idea/sqlDataSources.xml
.idea/dynamic.xml
.idea/uiDesigner.xml
powerui/powerui.iml
powerui/target/*
test/powerui-test.iml
annotations/powerui-annotations.iml
test/target/*
core/powerfx-core.iml
.idea/gradle.xml
.idea/libraries
.idea/mongoSettings.xml

.gitignore.general_idea: Remove Gradle-specific ignore entries as the project likely relies solely on Maven.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin source and target levels to Java 17 to ensure compilation on the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 17 features (e.g., records, sealed classes, text blocks) will fail to compile with source/target 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.annotation-api dependency to provide annotations removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Classes using @Generated or other javax.annotation types will fail to compile if the dependency is missing on Java 11+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jsr250-api dependency to provide Common Annotations (e.g., @PostConstruct) removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Classes using @PostConstruct or @PreDestroy will fail to compile if the dependency is missing on Java 11+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JUnit Jupiter dependency to support modern JUnit 5 testing framework.
Add JetBrains annotations dependency for nullability and other static analysis hints.
Add SLF4J API dependency for logging support.
Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer release compatible with modern Maven builds.
Update maven-source-plugin version to a newer release.
Update maven-javadoc-plugin version to a newer release.
Update maven-jar-plugin version to a newer release.
Add flatten-maven-plugin to manage CI-friendly versioning with ${revision} property.
Add maven-surefire-plugin to configure test execution for JUnit 5.
Add maven-gpg-plugin to sign artifacts for release to Maven Central.
Add nexus-staging-maven-plugin to automate deployment to Sonatype OSSRH.
Add maven-release-plugin to automate release processes.
Add maven-deploy-plugin configuration to skip default deployment in favor of nexus-staging.
Update auto-service dependency version.
Update javapoet dependency version.
Update javax.inject dependency version to use property.
Rebrand project artifact ID and name from 'di'/'SimpleDI' to 'wire-di-development-root'/'WireDI'.
Update SCM URL to reflect new repository name 'WireDI'.
Update project URL to reflect new repository name 'WireDI'.
Refactor module names to include 'wire-di-' prefix.
Add distributionManagement configuration for deploying to Sonatype OSSRH.
Add executions to maven-source-plugin to attach sources automatically.
Add executions to maven-javadoc-plugin to attach javadocs automatically.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update groupId to reflect a domain rebranding from GitHub user namespace to a dedicated domain.
Rename artifactId to a shorter, cleaner name.
Simplify version string by removing SNAPSHOT suffix and standardizing format.
Explicitly declare packaging type as jar.
Introduce a parent POM to inherit common configuration and dependency management.
Add java.version property to centralize Java version configuration.
Replace internal dependency with Jakarta Inject TCK for compliance testing.
Replace internal processor dependency with JUnit Jupiter API for modern testing.
Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a more recent stable release.
Refactor compiler source/target configuration to use the centralized java.version property.
Update license URL to use HTTPS for security.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Added imports for Jakarta/JSR-330 annotations and test command classes to support dependency injection features.
Replaced instance initializer block with a formal constructor and added a UUID field for identity tracking.
Added a method annotated with @PostConstruct to test lifecycle callback handling.
Added methods annotated with @Inject to test field/method injection of dependencies.
Implemented the id() method from the IDependency interface to return the generated UUID.
Added a method annotated with @Provider to test provider functionality.
Added a new method signature to the IDependency interface.
Replace the old `WiredTypes` API with the new `WireRepository` API to align with the refactored dependency injection framework.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: The class `com.github.thorbenkuck.di.WiredTypes` and its methods `load()` and `getInstance()` have been removed or renamed in the new version, causing compilation errors if the old API is used.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Add global configuration for wire conflict strategy using the new `WiredTypesConfiguration` API.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: The new framework requires or supports explicit configuration of conflict resolution strategies via `WiredTypesConfiguration`, which did not exist in the previous version.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the new package structure and API classes introduced in the refactoring.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: The old import `com.github.thorbenkuck.di.WiredTypes` no longer exists, and new classes like `WireRepository` and `WiredTypesConfiguration` are located in different packages.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Extend the main method to demonstrate new framework features such as retrieving all instances of a type and dynamic configuration changes.
Replace custom @Nullable annotation with JetBrains equivalent to align with new dependency structure.
test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.why_exists: The custom annotation class com.github.thorbenkuck.di.annotations.Nullable is removed or relocated, causing a compile error if not replaced.

test/src/main/java/com/github/thorbenkuc.general_idea: Remove unused import for Foo class which is no longer referenced in the class body.
Remove unused import for Singleton annotation which is no longer applied to the class.
Add import for new WireRepository dependency injected into the class.
Add import for NonExisting test class used in new nullable injection test.
Add import for PrintParameter annotation used in new method tests.
Add import for JetBrains NotNull annotation used in constructor parameter.
Add import for PostConstruct annotation used in lifecycle method.
Remove @Singleton annotation from class as it is no longer required or supported in this context.
Add new injected field for WireRepository to test repository injection.
Add new injected field for NonExisting to test nullable injection of missing dependencies.
Remove injected field for Foo which is no longer part of the test scope.
Update constructor to use @NotNull annotation and improved logging message.
Update foo method to print detailed state of all injected dependencies.
Add PostConstruct method to test lifecycle callback functionality.
Add print method annotated with @PrintParameter to test parameter handling.
Add printAndReturn method annotated with @PrintParameter to test return value handling.
